summary: Frontend UI refinements testing completed successfully. Tested all 9 features requested: feature cards, WHY INFOTRON heading, services pages content removal, founding year change, culture images, CEIPAL widget styling, and footer updates.

feature_cards_homepage.details: Cards centered with max-w-[1400px], gap-6 lg:gap-8, rounded-2xl corners, hover:scale-[1.03] and hover:shadow-2xl animations, animate-fade-in-up on scroll

why_infotron_heading.details: Heading visible with text-5xl lg:text-6xl xl:text-7xl classes, prominent and well-spaced

staff_augmentation_what_is_removed.details: 'What is Staff Augmentation?' section successfully removed from /services/staff-augmentation

managed_services_what_is_removed.details: 'What is Managed Services?' section successfully removed from /services/managed-services

business_consulting_what_is_removed.details: 'What is Business Consulting?' section successfully removed from /services/business-consulting

founding_year_2021.details: About page shows 'Infotron Solutions was founded in 2021' correctly

culture_diverse_images.details: 4 diverse team images with labels: Team Collaboration, Inclusive Workspace, Leadership, Global Workforce

ceipal_widget_dark_theme.details: CEIPAL widget loaded with dark theme styling via .ceipal-wrapper class and CSS overrides

footer_logo_linkedin.details: Logo has h-[120px] class, LinkedIn URL correct: https://www.linkedin.com/company/infotronsolutions/

services_dropdown.details: Services dropdown working with all 3 options visible on hover

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI refinements verified working correctly. Feature cards have proper centering, gaps, rounded corners and animations. WHY INFOTRON? heading is large and prominent. All 3 service pages have 'What is...' sections removed. About page shows founding year 2021 and has 4 diverse team images in Culture section. Careers page CEIPAL widget has dark theme styling. Footer logo is 120px with correct LinkedIn URL.
